case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR VS. UMAIR KHAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,668.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT KHAN, UMAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-13-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DORAN GIN-SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
